vocab.meaning: nguồn gốc lâu đời và uy tín
vocab.example: I am willing to invest in footwear with a long pedigree because it guarantees a certain level of reliability.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/thành tựu vượt bậc về công nghệ
vocab.example: Leading sports brands often showcase their technological prowess through advanced foam cushioning and energy-return soles.
Some people are drawn to high-end labels for the sense of exclusivity that mass-market products simply can't provide.

vocab.meaning: tỷ lệ giữa giá cả và chất lượng
vocab.example: I meticulously evaluate the price-to-quality ratio before splurging on a pair of designer leather boots.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi/chán ngán với thời trang nhanh
vocab.example: Suffering from fast-fashion fatigue, I now prefer to purchase fewer, high-quality items from reputable global houses.

vocab.meaning: các vật liệu bền bỉ/có khả năng phục hồi tốt
vocab.example: Famous outdoor brands utilize resilient materials that can withstand harsh weather conditions and rough terrains.

vocab.meaning: đẹp mắt/có tính thẩm mỹ cao
vocab.example: While comfort is paramount, I cannot deny that famous designers create some of the most aesthetically pleasing silhouettes on the market.

vocab.meaning: di sản và truyền thống của thương hiệu
vocab.example: I value brand heritage, as companies that have survived for decades usually have perfected their shoemaking techniques.

vocab.meaning: thị trường bị bão hòa bởi...
vocab.example: In a market saturated with generic styles, big-name brands often stand out with their unique and bold design languages.

vocab.meaning: ngược lại với lẽ thường/trực giác
vocab.example: It might seem counterintuitive to spend a fortune on sneakers, but the long-term comfort justifies the initial investment.
